stimulus: Optical telescopes capture the wavelengths of light visible to the human eye. Radio telescopes, ______blank capture wavelengths far longer than visible light, providing critical information to radio astronomers like Beatriz Salinas, who studies pulsar timing from a high-altitude observatory in the Atacama.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. "By contrast" logically signals that the information about radio telescopes in this sentence—that they capture wavelengths far longer than visible light—presents a direct contrast to the previous information about optical telescopes capturing visible wavelengths.

Choice B is incorrect because "in conclusion" illogically signals that the information about radio telescopes concludes or summarizes the previous information, when it instead provides a contrasting case. Choice C is incorrect because "afterward" illogically signals a chronological sequence, when the sentence presents a contrasting capability rather than a later event. Choice D is incorrect because "for example" illogically signals that the radio telescope is an example of an optical telescope, when the two represent contrasting instruments operating on different wavelengths.
